title: Bare Bones - Alex Zombie Variant
description: Adds an Alex variant to any mob that looks like Steve, for Bare Bones
body:
This resource pack adds a Bare Bones variant of the zombie, husk, drowned, and allay that look like Alex rather than Steve. The Alex variant will spawn 50% of the time. 

The Alex variant has the slim arm model, and slightly higher pitched sound effects.

---

Requires [_Entity Texture Features_](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [_Entity Model Features_](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitymodelfeatures). [_Entity Sound Features_](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitysoundfeatures) is optional as the pack will work without it, albeit Alex will sound the same as Steve.

Click here for the version of this pack supporting [_Fresh Animations_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-x-bare-bones-alex-zombie-variant). 
\
Note that it is _not_ and addon pack. You will not need this vanilla version if you use the Fresh Animations one.

---

![Two zombies in a plains biome, Alex on the left and Steve on the right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uK2d21Gv/images/5175f5c689ffffa15022077b51ba78b35098c77f.png)

![Two husks in a desert, Steve on the left and Alex on the right. Alex has sandly clothes to match the husk rather than her normal green shirt.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uK2d21Gv/images/26908f712c1bbe9114f05b2e9523a3440bcc3ab1.png)

![Two drowneds in a kelp forest on the ocean floor. Steve on the left and Alex on the right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qliqt3A2/images/a5d137cfa2f14638b3f26c839d9ea710b68505f2.png)

![Two allays floating in a dark forest, Steve on the left and Alex on the right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qliqt3A2/images/24dbb75bbc8ed175d9711ab4e754e103e581fd20.png)
